title: USNA General Information
description: Quicklinks page for Leaders to Serve the Nation at USNA.edu. Updated Thu Jan 29 09:34:48 EST 2026.
text:
Index of Topics
A-Z Index
There is a site index at A-Z Index .
Top
Accessing Webpages
If you have problems accessing USNA Google Apps for Government (e.g., Gmail), Blackboard, SSL VPN & Other Web Applications you should read this solution page
Top
Admissions Assistance
For information about gaining admission to the Naval Academy, visit the Admissions web site.
Contact USNA Admissions directly
Top
Alumni Information
Graduates and friends of USNA will be interested in the following information:
Visit the official Alumni Association Web Site
Visit the official USNA Foundation Web Site
Registrar's Office
Top
Athletics Assistance
For information about athletics at the Naval Academy, the following page contains a comprehensive list of athletic resources at USNA.
Athletic Information
For Ticket Information, please call 1-800-US-4-NAVY
Top
Chaplain's Center
For information about service schedules, religious education, chapel tours, weddings, memorial services, baptism and other chapel information and events, visit the Chaplain's Center website.
Contact USNA
For most commonly requested USNA contact information visit our Contact Page.
Top
Directions
Planning a trip to Annapolis? We have Directions on-line.
Top
E-Mail Addresses
Due to the Privacy Act of 1974, it is illegal for USNA to release the e-mail addresses of midshipmen without the express written consent of the individuals involved.
Top
Employment Opportunities with USNA
There are six sources of employment associated with Naval Academy and its supporting organizations.
Please see:
Employment Information Site on-line
Top
Events
There is a list of events provided by the Public Affairs Office. You can also see:
Academic Schedules
Athletics
Chapel Services
Pipes & Drums
Sports Schedules
USNA Band Schedule
Top
Gift Shop
Visit the Gift Shop
Top
IT Assistance
Visit the ITSC Homepage for help with computers, accounts, e-mail questions, or reporting network problems.
Top
Musical Activities
For concerts and tickets information please visit the Music Department website.
Top
Phone Numbers
For a list of Academy phone numbers, please visit the Public Affairs Office USNA Phone Numbers Page.
Personnel Look Up Service
Directory Listings
Top
Post Office
Hours: Monday - Friday; 1100 - 1600. Closed on Saturday and Sunday
Location: Bancroft Hall, 7th Wing, 7B 35A
Phone Number: 410-293-3787
Services:
Stamps
Overnight Mail
Certified Mail
International Mail
Packing Supplies
No Bulk Mailing
No Passports at this time
Address: Naval Academy Branch - Annapolis, MD 21412
Top
Public Information / Public Affairs Office
General information about the Naval Academy, including current news and press releases, USNA's Social Media sites, Community Relations, Speakers Bureau activity, Scheduled Events, and available photographs of USNA.
If you would like to contact the Public Affairs Office:
For more information, please visit the Public Affairs Office web site.
Top
Social Media Site Index
The Naval Academy has Institutional Social Media sites, but so do a number of organizations within USNA.
Social Media Site Index
Top
Transcripts - Registrar's Office
If you would like to obtain a copy of your transcripts, contact the Registrar's Office or send an E-mail to webregistrar@usna.edu.
Top
Visitor Center & Tours
Tours of the Naval Academy begin in the Armel-Leftwich Visitor Center. You can call the Visitor Center at 1-410-293-8687.
For more information - Naval Academy Tourism
Top
Weather Information
Current Weather Conditions at USNA
HAZARDOUS WEATHER POLICY: There is always the potential for hazardous weather. You can determine the current status of the Academy with regards to weather in one of the following ways:
Weather related notices will be posted on Facebook (USNA | NSAA) and Twitter ( USNA | NSAA)
Weather related bulletins on the following radio/TV stations:
Top
USNA Webmaster
If you have questions about the Naval Academy's web site, please send E-mail to webmaster@usna.edu
If you're not able to find the organization you'd like to contact, you may contact the Public Affairs Office at the Public Affairs Office web site.
